model_type: pseudo-3D physics-informed learned residual state-space world model

gates.name: synthetic_t100_protocol
gates.fix: Keep synthetic t+100 as verified evaluation and never mix it with real-data free-run metrics.

gates.name: no_real_t100_overclaim
gates.fix: Keep AerialMPT t+100 qualitative-only until a real long sequence is loaded.

gates.name: long_horizon_accuracy
gates.evidence: hybrid_SMC ADE@100=4.216m; FDE@100=7.766m; target ADE<2m and FDE<5m
gates.fix: Train on larger/diverse synthetic data, add explicit goal inference, and tune model against rollout loss not only one-step residual.

gates.name: learned_dynamics_beats_hand_physics
gates.fix: Use multi-step rollout loss, residual dropout, event-balanced minibatches, and learned goal posterior instead of only one-step residual acceleration.

gates.name: stochastic_multibranch_coverage
gates.fix: Make SMC particles represent latent goals/intents, report actual best-of-N, and run true 64-particle evaluation after runtime stabilizes.

gates.name: physical_consistency
gates.fix: Make projection cost visible in weights, add stronger wall-aware path planning, and penalize boundary drift in rollout not just one-step training.

gates.name: constraints_reduce_violations
gates.fix: Keep physical projection, but separate correction from likelihood so invalid proposals are not silently sanitized.

gates.name: terminal_semantic_diversity
gates.fix: Cluster over intent, density, pass time, split/merge, detour, and jam features; evaluate event-balanced episodes and avoid endpoint-only semantics.

gates.name: smc_adds_predictive_value
gates.fix: Use learned proposal as residual around physics, not standalone acceleration; add observation/state likelihood on synthetic and latent-goal rejuvenation.

gates.name: real_world_readiness
gates.evidence: real_data_limits_acknowledged=True; next_data_named=True; no calibrated long real-data loader yet
gates.fix: Build a long real-data loader, calibrated scene geometry, and verified t+100 real benchmark before claiming real-world readiness.

priority_actions: Train on larger/diverse synthetic data, add explicit goal inference, and tune model against rollout loss not only one-step residual.
Use multi-step rollout loss, residual dropout, event-balanced minibatches, and learned goal posterior instead of only one-step residual acceleration.
Make SMC particles represent latent goals/intents, report actual best-of-N, and run true 64-particle evaluation after runtime stabilizes.
Build a long real-data loader, calibrated scene geometry, and verified t+100 real benchmark before claiming real-world readiness.
Cluster over intent, density, pass time, split/merge, detour, and jam features; evaluate event-balanced episodes and avoid endpoint-only semantics.
Use learned proposal as residual around physics, not standalone acceleration; add observation/state likelihood on synthetic and latent-goal rejuvenation.
